_about: Reference for every configurable field. Copy individual keys into config/settings.json (shared, git-tracked) or config/settings.local.json (machine-local, gitignored). Precedence high→low: REGIN_* env > settings.local.json > settings.json > defaults. Unknown keys are ignored — pydantic-settings runs with extra='ignore'. Authoritative source: lib/settings.py.
_paths: All path values support a leading ~ (expanded at boot). Setting only REGIN_DATA_DIR (or data_dir) rebases patterns_dir, grit_dir, tags_path, auto_tag_rules_path, log_dir, and payload_schemas_overlay_dir to live under it.
_logs: Activity-log JSONL stream (lib/activity_log.py). Distinct from session trace capture below.
_providers: Per-provider deploy targets. active_provider selects the default; providers{} carries optional per-provider path overrides. Flip experimental_providers to surface codex/generic in the Settings UI.
_experiments: Feature gates for UI surfaces in progress / off-by-default.
_pattern_search: Hybrid (BM25 + dense + cross-encoder) router config. Set pattern_router_dense_enabled=false to skip the embedding leg entirely (saves ~1.2GB model download).
_repos: Repositories registered for indexing. Managed by /repos UI or `regin add-repo` / `regin remove-repo`. Editing here directly works too.
_mode: standalone = local SQLite for auth/audit. shared = MySQL (set database_url).
_topics: External commands that draft topic proposals. Keyed by agent id; the UI exposes each by key.
_grader: Post-hoc session rubric grader (lib/grader). The screen tier is mechanical (no LLM); the deep tier consults an external agent from topic_proposal_external_agents (external_agent names a key; null = first). auto_escalate re-grades borderline screen results deep when a judge is configured.
_rule_trigger_thresholds: Classifies rules on /trace/triggers as active / noisy / dead.
_trace_capture: Session trace capture knobs (per-turn response text and prompt images).
_model_context_windows: Per-model override (model id → token count) merged on top of lib/tokens/model_windows.py.

_env_only_vars._note: Read at call time, NOT mirrored on the Settings class. Set in the shell / launcher, not here. See module docstring in lib/settings.py.
_env_only_vars.REGIN_DATA_DIR: Overrides data_dir at module import; rebases all derived paths.
_env_only_vars.REGIN_INGEST_BASE_URL: Override the hook plugin's ingest URL (lib/hook_plugin.py).
_env_only_vars.REGIN_INGEST_MAX_ATTR_BYTES: Cap per-attribute byte size on ingested spans.
_env_only_vars.REGIN_TRACE_TEST: Tag ingested rows with is_test=true (testing only).
_env_only_vars.REGIN_DATABASE_URL: MySQL connection string for shared mode.
_env_only_vars.REGIN_ACTIVITY_LOG_DISABLED: Set to 1 to disable activity log entirely.
_env_only_vars.REGIN_CODEX_STOP_END_FALLBACK: Fallback behavior for codex Stop events.
_env_only_vars.REGIN_PRICING_CACHE: Override path for pricing cache JSON.
_env_only_vars.GRIT_BIN: grit binary path (default: grit on PATH).
